mapper.update: /*AcenMapper.updateAcenOsstTrg*/ UPDATE NMCP_ACEN_REQ SET END_STATUS= 'P' WHERE REQUEST_KEY IN ( SELECT REQUEST_KEY FROM ( SELECT REQUEST_KEY FROM NMCP_ACEN_REQ WHERE NVL(RTY_DT, REGST_DT) BETWEEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE-14, 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND END_STATUS = 'N' AND REQ_STATUS != 'Y' AND (REQ_STATUS = 'T' OR PRE_CHECK_YN = 'Y') /*OSST 연동 대기 상태 또는 사전체크 완료된 건*/ ORDER BY REGST_DTTM ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{limitCnt} )
mapper.select: /*AcenMapper.getAcenPendingTrg*/ SELECT A.REQUEST_KEY --신청키 ,A.RES_NO --예약번호 ,A.EVNT_GRP_CD --업무그룹 ,A.EVNT_TYPE --업무유형 ,A.REQ_STATUS --요청상태 ,A.END_STATUS --종료상태 ,A.PRE_CHECK_YN --사전체크 여부 ,A.OPEN_YN --개통여부 ,B.PSTATE --신청서 상태 ,B.REQUEST_STATE_CODE --신청서 진행상태 ,C.DLVRY_TYPE --배송유형 FROM NMCP_ACEN_REQ A ,MCP_REQUEST B ,MCP_REQUEST_DLVRY C WHERE A.REQUEST_KEY = B.REQUEST_KEY AND B.REQUEST_KEY = C.REQUEST_KEY AND NVL(A.RTY_DT, A.REGST_DT) BETWEEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE-14, 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND A.END_STATUS = 'P' ORDER BY A.REGST_DTTM

/*AcenMapper.getOsstResult*/ SELECT MVNO_ORD_NO --MVNO오더번호 ,SEQ --일련번호 ,OSST_ORD_NO --OSST오더번호 ,PRGR_STAT_CD --이벤트코드 ,RSLT_CD --처리결과코드 ,RSLT_MSG --처리결과내용 FROM ( SELECT MVNO_ORD_NO, SEQ, OSST_ORD_NO, PRGR_STAT_CD, RSLT_CD, RSLT_MSG FROM MCP_REQUEST_OSST WHERE MVNO_ORD_NO = LPAD(#{mvnoOrdNo}, 14, '0') AND PRGR_STAT_CD = #{prgrStatCd} ORDER BY SEQ DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

/*AcenMapper.getWantNumbers*/ SELECT REQ_WANT_NUMBER ,REQ_WANT_NUMBER2 ,REQ_WANT_NUMBER3 ,NVL((SELECT EXPNSN_STR_VAL1 FROM NMCP_CD_DTL WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = 'AcenLimit' AND DTL_CD = 'findLimit'), '3') AS FIND_COUNT FROM MCP_REQUEST WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
mapper.insert: /*AcenMapper.insertOsstResvTlhp*/ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_OSST ( MVNO_ORD_NO ,SEQ ,OSST_ORD_NO ,PRGR_STAT_CD ,RSLT_CD ,RSLT_DT ,TLPH_NO_STAT_CD ,ASGN_AGNC_ID ,TLPH_NO_OWN_CMPN_CD ,OPEN_SVC_IND_CD ,ENCD_TLPH_NO ,TLPH_NO ,IF_TYPE ,REGST_DTTM ) VALUES ( LPAD(#{resNo}, 14, '0') ,(SELECT MAX(SEQ+1) FROM MCP_REQUEST_OSST WHERE MVNO_ORD_NO = LPAD(#{resNo}, 14, '0')) ,(SELECT MAX(OSST_ORD_NO) FROM MCP_REQUEST_OSST WHERE MVNO_ORD_NO = LPAD(#{resNo}, 14, '0') AND PRGR_STAT_CD = 'PC2' AND RSLT_CD = '0000') ,'NU2' ,'0000' ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ,#{tlphNoStatCd} ,#{asgnAgncId} ,#{tlphNoOwnCmncCmpnCd} ,#{openSvcIndCd} ,#{encdTlphNo} ,#{tlphNo} ,'RSV' ,SYSDATE )
mapper.select: /*AcenMapper.getAcenEndTrg*/ SELECT A.REQUEST_KEY ,A.EVNT_TYPE ,B.PSTATE ,B.REQUEST_STATE_CODE FROM NMCP_ACEN_REQ A ,MCP_REQUEST B WHERE A.REQUEST_KEY = B.REQUEST_KEY AND NVL(A.RTY_DT, A.REGST_DT) BETWEEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE-15, 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE-1, 'YYYYMMDD') AND A.END_STATUS = 'N' AND (A.REQ_STATUS = 'T' OR A.PRE_CHECK_YN = 'Y')

/*AcenMapper.getAcenPeriodEndTrg*/ SELECT A.REQUEST_KEY ,A.EVNT_TYPE ,B.PSTATE ,B.REQUEST_STATE_CODE FROM NMCP_ACEN_REQ A ,MCP_REQUEST B WHERE A.REQUEST_KEY = B.REQUEST_KEY AND NVL(A.RTY_DT, A.REGST_DT) = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE-15, 'YYYYMMDD') AND A.END_STATUS = 'N'

/*AcenMapper.getAppformReq*/ SELECT A.REQUEST_KEY ,A.RES_NO ,B.ENGG_MNTH_CNT ,B.SOC_CODE ,A.ON_OFF_TYPE ,A.OPER_TYPE ,A.REQ_BUY_TYPE ,A.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID ,TO_CHAR(A.REQ_IN_DAY, 'YYYYMMDD') AS REQ_IN_DAY FROM MCP_REQUEST A ,MCP_REQUEST_SALEINFO B WHERE A.REQUEST_KEY = B.REQUEST_KEY AND A.REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
mapper.update: /*AcenMapper.updateNormalPState*/ UPDATE MCP_REQUEST SET PSTATE = '00' WHERE TO_CHAR(REQ_IN_DAY, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE-15, 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE-1, 'YYYYMMDD') AND PSTATE = '50' AND REQUEST_STATE_CODE = '21'
mapper.select: /*AcenMapper.getMcpRequestStateInfo*/ SELECT PSTATE --신청서 상태 ,REQUEST_STATE_CODE --신청서 진행상태 ,RVISN_ID --신청서 수정자 FROM MCP_REQUEST WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
mapper.insert: /*AcenMapper.insertAcenFailHist*/ INSERT INTO NMCP_ACEN_FAIL_HIST ( REQUEST_KEY ,SEQ ,RES_NO ,EVNT_GRP_CD ,EVNT_TYPE ,REQ_STATUS ,FAIL_RMK ,RTY_ID ,RTY_DTTM ,REGST_ID ,REGST_DTTM ) SELECT REQUEST_KEY ,NVL((SELECT MAX(SEQ) + 1 FROM NMCP_ACEN_FAIL_HIST WHERE REQUEST_KEY= #{requestKey}), 1) ,RES_NO ,EVNT_GRP_CD ,EVNT_TYPE ,REQ_STATUS ,RMK ,RTY_ID ,RTY_DTTM ,'ACEN01' ,SYSDATE FROM NMCP_ACEN_REQ WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
mapper.select: /*AcenMapper.getPreCheckSuccessCnt*/ SELECT IF_TYPE FROM MCP_REQUEST_OSST WHERE MVNO_ORD_NO = LPAD(#{resNo}, 14, '0') AND SEQ = (SELECT SEQ FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY SEQ DESC) RNK, SEQ FROM MCP_REQUEST_OSST WHERE MVNO_ORD_NO = LPAD(#{resNo}, 14, '0') AND PRGR_STAT_CD= 'NU2' AND SUBSTR(RSLT_DT, 1,8) = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND IF_TYPE = 'WEB' AND RSLT_CD = 'N' ) WHERE RNK = 1) -1

/*AcenMapper.getAcenNoResponseTrg*/ SELECT REQUEST_KEY ,EVNT_TYPE ,PSTATE ,REQUEST_STATE_CODE FROM ( SELECT A.REQUEST_KEY ,A.EVNT_TYPE ,B.RSLT_DATE ,C.PSTATE ,C.REQUEST_STATE_CODE ,DECODE(D.DLVRY_TYPE, '02', E.EXPNSN_STR_VAL3 , E.EXPNSN_STR_VAL2) AS LIMIT_TIME FROM NMCP_ACEN_REQ A ,NMCP_ACEN_HIST B ,MCP_REQUEST C ,MCP_REQUEST_DLVRY D ,NMCP_CD_DTL E WHERE A.REQUEST_KEY = B.REQUEST_KEY AND A.REQUEST_KEY = C.REQUEST_KEY AND A.REQUEST_KEY = D.REQUEST_KEY AND A.EVNT_TYPE = E.DTL_CD AND B.SEQ = (SELECT MAX(SEQ) FROM NMCP_ACEN_HIST WHERE REQUEST_KEY = B.REQUEST_KEY) AND E.CD_GROUP_ID = 'AcenEvntType' AND A.END_STATUS = 'N' AND A.REQ_STATUS = 'Y' ) WHERE NVL(LIMIT_TIME, '0') != '0' AND RSLT_DATE + LIMIT_TIME/24/60 <= SYSDATE ORDER BY REQUEST_KEY
/*AcenMapper.getMaxProcCnt*/ SELECT NVL(EXPNSN_STR_VAL1, '30') FROM NMCP_CD_DTL WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = 'AcenLimit' AND DTL_CD = 'procCnt'
